body.title: Extend ADC goal to factory-factory — non-coding methodology portability
body.text:
# D-goal-factory-factory-2026-05-20
**title:** Extend ADC goal to factory-factory — non-coding methodology portability
**date:** 2026-05-20
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-goal-factory-factory-edit

## Decision narrative
Extend the existing ADC program-factory goal node to include the factory-factory framing: the same skills/telemetry/audit methodology should be portable to non-coding project types. The ADC is not just a software factory — it is a substrate for building any kind of factory.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
